---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact information

**Dr. Hui Wang**  

Email: huiw16@uci.edu

## Links
- [Nanjing-Helsinki Institute](https://nh.nju.edu.cn/en/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Z0dodu4AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3380-6903)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/HuiWangWanderInGitHub)
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Hui-Wang-95?ev=hdr_xprf&_sg=JfEj1hUKcNrfYrQH9-77kXsu4PiqrnHb2Dz2Mire3L2sbNaNtzHb9sSn-ZZlHvPcUVxeuhQKVwgpR6avkA47In-F)
